sessions.summary: Priya reviewed her monthly finances after salary credit and committed to cutting food delivery spending in half and transferring ₹30,000 to her house fund on the 25th.
commitments: Transfer ₹30,000 to house fund on the 25th of November
insights: Committed monthly bills total ₹46,500 (rent ₹25,000, SIP ₹10,000, internet + mobile ₹3,500, credit card ₹8,000)
Food delivery was the single largest discretionary expense last month at ₹11,690 across 7 Swiggy/Zomato orders — 32% of total variable spending
Other variable spending categories last month: shopping ₹8,000 (Myntra/Amazon), groceries ₹3,200, fuel ₹2,200, entertainment ₹1,500
User has a house down payment goal of ₹15 lakh within 2 years (by ~November 2027)
House fund already has ₹95,000 saved; needs ~₹16,875/month to stay on track
